title: pittosporum reflexisepalum
intro: Pittosporum reflexisepalum, also known as the Tī Kōuka, is a type of evergreen tree native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pittosporum reflexisepalum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for various medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
